channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: La mise à jour arrive, les Samsung Galaxy S26 vont enfin pouvoir utiliser AirDrop
item.description: Le partage de fichiers entre l'univers Apple et les smartphones Android s'apprête à franchir un cap historique. Samsung vient de confirmer l'intégration prochaine de la compatibilité AirDrop via son outil Quick Share sur sa toute nouvelle gamme Galaxy S26.

item.title: Project Hail Mary could teach humanity a thing or two
item.description: It's hard not to find the premise of Andy Weir's Project Hail Mary instantly compelling: Something is slowly killing the sun and threatening life on Earth. That same mysterious force, dubbed the Astrophage, also destroyed every nearby star — except one. Our only hope is to visit that solar system and figure out what helped it survive. And there's just one middle school science teacher who can do it. At its core is Weir's love of technical problem solving, along with a tremendous performance by Ryan Gosling in full nerd hero mode as the aforementioned science teacher (and former molecular biolo...

item.title: États-Unis | Nouvelle tentative du gouvernement Trump pour empêcher les États de réguler l’IA
item.description: Le gouvernement Trump a appelé vendredi le Congrès à légiférer pour empêcher les États américains de voter leurs propres lois de régulation de l’intelligence artificielle (IA), une nouvelle tentative après un premier échec l’été dernier.

item.title: AI startups are eating the venture industry and the returns, so far, are good
item.description: AI startups accounted for 41% of the $128 billion in venture dollars raised by companies on Carta last year — a record-high annual share.

item.title: Amazon has slashed the Fire TV Stick 4K Select to its lowest price ever thanks to an easy-to-miss coupon
item.description: The Amazon Fire TV Stick 4K Select gets you everything you need for a dirt-cheap price.

item.title: Does Nvidia’s Slop-ified DLSS 5 Game Lighting Make Any Sense?
item.description: Nvidia finally reveals what's actually going on with its upscaler, and it's much less impressive than it first seemed.

item.title: Google’s battery-powered Nest Doorbell is $40 off right now
item.description: Buying a video doorbell is worth it for several reasons. They’re convenient if you get a lot of deliveries or visitors, as they let you glance at a phone alert to decide whether it’s necessary to drop everything and go to the door. They can provide peace of mind, too, particularly if you’re heading out […]

item.title: Des serveurs cachés dans des éoliennes en pleine mer : la parade ultime pour refroidir les data centers
item.description: L’idée de rapprocher physiquement la production d’énergie et les centres de données n’est pas nouvelle. Mais cette entreprise pousse le concept bien plus loin en intégrant directement des serveurs informatiques au cœur même d’une centrale électrique en mer.

item.title: ChatGPT might not be using the model you think — and it’s also hiding others in settings
item.description: ChatGPT’s new interface hides a more complex system where multiple models are used behind the scenes.

item.title: These are the top 6 4K Blu-rays I recommend from 2026 so far — and I've tested them all
item.description: 2026 has been a great year for 4K Blu-ray already, so I've picked the 6 best discs that I've tested as part of the Blu-ray Bounty.

item.title: 'I pretended like I wasn't afraid, but I was' — Ready or Not 2: Here I Come star breaks down that unhinged ending and one killer twist you definitely missed
item.description: Of course Ready or Not 2: Here I Come was going to have the wildest ending ever, star it left one star a lot more 'scared' than they let on.

item.title: ‘The bleeding edge of computing power for everyday creatives’ — this is why I’m upgrading to the MacBook Air M5 after years of making do with my elderly Pro
item.description: For my new MacBook, I'm not going Neo or Pro —here's why the Air M5 is the next laptop I’m going to buy.

item.title: So What’s the Deal With the ‘Steel Ball Run’ Release Schedule?
item.description: Netflix's weird silence about its release plan for the latest 'JoJo's Bizarre Adventure' saga has fans nervously bracing themselves for another 'Stone Ocean' fiasco.

item.title: Lenovo Ryzen 7 laptop with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD is just $430 at Best Buy — but it won't be this price for long
item.description: Lenovo's 15.6-inch laptop pairs a Ryzen 7 5825U with 16GB of RAM and a 512GB SSD, delivering smooth performance for everyday creative tasks.

item.title: Vous en avez assez de la crise de la RAM ? Elle pourrait s’arrêter bien plus tard qu’annoncé
item.description: Le fabricant SK Hynix pensait que la pénurie de RAM allait durer encore 2 ans. C'était visiblement trop optimiste puisqu'il revoit son estimation à la hausse.

item.title: 'A massive leap in speed that's impossible to ignore': Our top-rated 2TB Corsair USB4 portable SSD drops to $300
item.description: Corsair’s 2TB external SSD delivers ultra-fast USB4 speeds for handling large files and demanding workflows with ease.

item.title: Un empire chinois du dark web s’effondre : 373 000 sites criminels ont été saisis
item.description: Derrière la promesse sordide de contenus pédopornographiques, un empire chinois du dark web a généré 345 000 euros de bénéfices. Le réseau vient d'être neutralisé par les forces de l'ordre.

item.title: Save £300: Lenovo's vibrant Core Ultra 5 OLED Aura Edition laptop drops to £599 at Currys
item.description: Lenovo’s 14-inch laptop has an Intel Core Ultra 5 processor, 16GB of RAM, a 512GB SSD, and a vibrant OLED display — and it's 33% off.

item.title: Sony leads the pack for the best headphones deals available ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: We've spotted over 20 worthwhile headphones and earbuds deals live already ahead of Amazon's Big Spring Sale.

item.title: Catch em all: PopSockets just dropped a new Pokémon collection, and it’s going to sell out fast
item.description: PopSockets just launched a new Day and Night collection featuring fan-favorite Pokémon like Mew, Gengar, Espeon, and Umbreon. Here is where to buy the new MagSafe grips, cases, and wallets.

item.title: Après le fiasco du Fire Phone, Amazon préparerait un smartphone carburant à l’IA
item.description: L'accident industriel du Fire Phone est oublié. Amazon développerait de nouveau un smartphone maison fortement infusé à l'IA… et au shopping.

item.title: It’s time cyber security understood human behavior and acted accordingly
item.description: Even with the strongest technical defenses, humans remain a critical factor in cyber security.

item.title: I tested the Ulefone RugKing Pad Pro, and considering the price, it’s surprisingly rugged and feature-packed
item.description: A genuinely capable mini-tablet with rugged certifications, decent battery life and the ability to attach a range of handy accessories.

item.title: Cyberattack on vehicle breathalyzer company leaves drivers stranded across the US
item.description: A cyberattack on a U.S. car breathalyzer company has left drivers across the United States reportedly stranded and unable to start their vehicles.

item.title: The Artist Pro 27 is XP-Pen’s latest 4K flagship display tablet
item.description: XP-Pen has launched a new 27-inch display drawing tablet that competes with the visual performance of Wacom's beloved Cintiq Pro series, but for a fraction of the cost. The Artist Pro 27 is available starting today for $1,899.99, providing a 4K resolution display with a 120Hz refresh rate and extreme color accuracy, according to XP-Pen's […]

item.title: At Palantir’s Developer Conference, AI Is Built to Win Wars
item.description: As business soars, Palantir is doubling down on a vision of AI built for battlefield advantage—and attracting customers who agree.

item.title: Ikea home office trends for 2026: breathe life into your study with calming greens and natural cork accessories
item.description: Earth-toned accessories to bring in a touch of nature.

item.title: AI workloads are increasing wasted cloud spend for the first time in 5 years – but AI governance teams might be a solution
item.description: AI and cloud spend are up, but companies might not be expanding as efficiently as they could be, leading to wasted resources.

item.title: Multiple OpenWebUI AI servers infected with cryptominers and infostealers stayed up for over a year
item.description: Almost 100 OpenWebUI instances had no authentication, leaving them open to abuse by anyone.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #748)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: 7 new movies and TV shows to watch on Netflix, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more this weekend (March 20)
item.description: From the Peaky Blinders movie to Invincible season 4, you've got a lot to choose from this weekend.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #1014)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, March 21 (game #1517)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: 20 fitness tracker deals to shop ahead of the Amazon Big Spring Sale
item.description: Fitness tracker deals are already starting to roll in for the Amazon Big Spring Sale. Here's the best deals on Apple, Garmin, and more.

item.title: Amazon working on new smartphone with Alexa at its core, report says
item.description: The device is being developed by the company's Devices and Services division, and it would feature personalized features aimed at making it easier to use Amazon's suite of apps, including Amazon shopping, Prime Video, and Prime Music, according to Reuters.

item.title: La Switch 2 déjà modifiée ? L’Europe pourrait forcer Nintendo à revoir sa console
item.description: Sortie il y a moins d'un an, la dernière machine de Nintendo enchaîne les records de ventes insolents. Pourtant, selon de sérieux échos venus du Japon, le constructeur plancherait déjà sur une révision matérielle surprise. L'objectif n'est pas de gonfler la puissance, mais de vous laisser enfin remplacer la batterie vous-même.

item.title: Belkin Charging Case Pro for Switch 2 review: A more elegant solution
item.description: Last year, Belkin released a couple of cases for the Nintendo Switch 2 just in time for launch, including one that came with a handy battery pack. That one was simple and effective, but it felt a bit crude because it wasn't much more than a basic travel pouch with a generic power cell tossed inside. Now, Belkin is back with a Pro version of its Charging Case for the Nintendo Switch 2, featuring a more sophisticated battery pack along with a higher price tag ($100 vs. $70). So here’s the question for any Switch 2 owners still looking for a way to protect their console while keeping it topped of...

item.title: The best robot vacuum deals to shop ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale: Dreame, Shark, and Eufy
item.description: Shop the best early robot vacuum deals from top brands during Amazon's 2026 Big Spring Sale. Save onDreame, Shark, and Eufy.

item.title: AirPods Pro 3 : les excellents écouteurs d’Apple chutent déjà sous les 200 euros
item.description: Les AirPods Pro 3 cumulent les qualités : performance acoustique, réduction de bruit active, autonomie, intégration dans l'écosystème Apple... Ils cochent toutes les cases et on les trouve en ce moment à 199 euros au lieu de 249 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: Amnezia Free launches in Brazil as citizens turn to VPNs amid new mandatory age checks
item.description: Amnezia VPN has officially expanded its free tier to users in Brazil. Designed strictly to unblock specific platforms, Amnezia Free aims to combat rising internet restrictions without costing users a dime.

item.title: Scientists Pump the Brakes on Psychedelic Antidepressant Hype
item.description: Turns out, it's very hard to remove a test subject's own bias about their psychedelic test treatment.

item.title: US Startup Wants Someone With a ‘History of Being Let Down by Technology’ to ‘Bully’ AI
item.description: The job requires someone to yell at AI chatbots for eight hours.

item.title: This sleek alarm clock uses lights and sounds to help you sleep, focus, and wake up
item.description: Dieter Rams already showed the world that something as mundane as an alarm clock can be beautiful. Balmuda, a Japanese company best known for its steam-infused toasters, has released a travel-friendly alarm clock simply called The Clock. Its minimalist dial is reminiscent of Braun's iconic alarm clocks but goes one step further by replacing traditional […]...

item.title: Apple AirTags are already discounted ahead of Amazons Big Spring Sale
item.description: Amazon's Big Spring Sale officially kicks off on March 25. But you can already score early discounts on Apple AirTags to keep track of your luggage, keys, and wallet.

item.title: Amazon Is Hell-Bent on Making Another Phone
item.description: The e-commerce giant seems undeterred by the colossal failure of the Fire Phone more than a decade ago.

item.title: Alexa+ is 'just more delightful,' says Amazon's VP of Alexa and Echo as the service rolls out to thousands of new customers
item.description: As Alexa+ gains ground in the UK, we had the opportunity to catch up with Daniel Rausch, Amazon's VP Alexa and Echo to find out more about the Generative AI rollout so far.

item.title: Google Search is now using AI to replace headlines
item.description: Since roughly the turn of the millennium, Google Search has been the bedrock of the web. People loved Google's trustworthy "10 blue links" search experience and its unspoken promise: The website you click is the website you get. Now, Google is beginning to replace news headlines in its search results with ones that are AI-generated. […]

item.title: Children’s ibuprofen recalled nationwide after customer complaints of ‘gel-like mass and black particles’
item.description: A recent enforcement report from the FDA provided limited details about the impacted product. Here’s what we know. Nearly 90,000 bottles of children’s ibuprofen have been recalled across the United States, according to an enforcement report this week from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA).

item.title: The March heat wave roasting the Southwest is ‘virtually impossible’ without human-induced climate change, scientists say
item.description: The U.S. Southwest is used to dealing with extreme heat, but not months ahead of schedule. The dangerous heat wave shattering March records all over the U.S. Southwest is more than just another extreme weather blip. It’s the latest next-level weather wildness that is occurring ever more frequently as Earth’s warming builds.Experts said unprecedented and deadly weather extremes that sometimes strike at abnormal times and in unusual places are putting more people in danger. For example, the Southwest is used to coping with deadly heat, but not months ahead of schedule, including a 110-degree F...

item.title: How to watch RB Leipzig vs. Hoffenheim online for free
item.description: How to watch Bundesliga for free. Watch RB Leipzig vs. Hoffenheim in the Bundesliga for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Amazon is reportedly working on a new phone built around Alexa
item.description: Amazon is reportedly planning to re-enter the smartphone market more than 10 years after its last attempt. According to a Reuters report, the mysterious phone is internally codenamed "Transformer" and is being developed by the company’s devices and services unit. There isn’t a whole lot to go on right now, but it probably won’t surprise many to learn that the phone will likely lean heavily on AI. According to Reuters’ sources, Alexa functionality would be a core part of the experience, but Amazon wouldn’t necessarily build a custom OS around its voice assistant. The phone would make buying pro...

item.title: How to watch Cagliari vs. Napoli online for free
item.description: How to watch Serie A for free. Watch Cagliari vs. Napoli in Serie A for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: Dunkin is giving away free ring boxes on National Proposal Day — how to claim yours today
item.description: Dunkin' is giving away free “I Dough” ring boxes on National Proposal Day (March 20). Here's how to qualify for this offer.

item.title: Amazon is launching a phone again
item.description: Amazon is planing to launch a smartphone again, new report claims.

item.title: 'I'm Batman': I tested the RayNeo Air 4 Pro Batman Justice Edition - the theme is unapologetically fun and the HDR10 and B&O audio experience is surprisingly good
item.description: The RayNeo Air 4 Pro Batman Justice Edition is a limited collector's variant of RayNeo's latest display glasses. Essentially adding a clip-on Batman mask and themed packaging to the existing hardware that delivers HDR10, Bang & Olufsen audio, and a 201-inch virtual screen.

item.title: A shocking video, an active investigation, and a canceled season: inside ‘The Bachelorette’ fallout
item.description: A domestic assault investigation, resurfaced footage, and halted filming on another show all factored into Disney’s decision. Fans of the Bachelor franchise are accustomed to hearing that the upcoming season will be the most “shocking” one ever. But this time, it’s the events leading up to the season that have been hard to believe. In fact, the life of season 22’s Bachelorette became so controversial, the latest season won’t even make it on air....

item.title: « Projet Transformer » : Amazon voudrait relancer un smartphone 12 ans après l’échec du Fire Phone
item.description: Amazon n'a pas complètement abandonné l'idée de percer sur le marché des smartphones. L'entreprise serait en train d'en développer un nouveau.

item.title: ‘Severance’ Star Dichen Lachman Has a New Job: Vampire Slayer
item.description: The Apple TV standout plays a monster hunter in ‘Vampires of the Velvet Lounge,’ which hits theaters March 20.

item.title: Much ado about protein
item.description: This is Optimizer, a weekly newsletter sent every Friday from Verge senior reviewer Victoria Song that dissects and discusses the latest gizmos and potions that swear they're going to change your life. Opt in for Optimizer here. Wellness crazes come and go, but protein is forever. At least that's how it feels as the algorithm […]

item.title: How to watch La Liga 2025/26: live stream guide, TV channels and key dates
item.description: With Barcelona defending their crown, here's our full guide to watching La Liga 2025/26 season live streams, broadcasters and TV channels around the world.

item.title: OpenAI is making an all-in-one 'superapp' that combines Codex, ChatGPT, and Atlas browser for maximum productivity
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly working to bring ChatGPT, Atlas and Codex into one app to make it easier for users to interact with AI.
